name: American Heritage International Inc.
business: American Heritage International Inc. sells premium disposable electronic cigarettes under the brand American Heritage. They market to smokers as an alternative to traditional tobacco cigarettes. They sell through ecommerce and retail distribution via brokers and distributors.
sellsTo: US retail stores (grocery, convenience, gas stations, mass retailers, etc.)

exposures.sentence: We intend to take advantage of the rapid growth of the electronic cigarette industry and become one of the market leaders.

catalysts.event: Receipt of next shipment of 50,000 electronic cigarette sticks
catalysts.sentence: We have distributed our first order of 20,800 electronic cigarettes ( Sticks ) and will receive our next shipment of 50,000 Sticks by the end of March and, due to increasing demand, we have placed an order for 100,000 Sticks to be received in April, 2014.

catalysts.event: Receipt of order of 100,000 electronic cigarette sticks
catalysts.sentence: We have distributed our first order of 20,800 electronic cigarettes ( Sticks ) and will receive our next shipment of 50,000 Sticks by the end of March and, due to increasing demand, we have placed an order for 100,000 Sticks to be received in April, 2014.

catalysts.event: Close of $0.25 Unit non-brokered private placement raising $67,000
catalysts.sentence: Subsequent to December 31, 2013 we have raised a further $67,000 pursuant to our $0.25 Unit non-brokered private placement which closed January 31, 2014

catalysts.event: Ongoing $1.00 Unit non-brokered private placement raising $403,250 to date with capacity to raise up to an additional $1,596,750
catalysts.sentence: Subsequent to December 31, 2013 we have raised a further $403,250 pursuant to our $1.00 Unit non-brokered private placement which is currently being offered to raise up to an additional $1,596,750.

tamClaims.claim: The electronic cigarette market was over $100 million in sales in 2010.
tamClaims.sentence: in 2010, the electronic cigarette market was over $100 million in sales.

tamClaims.claim: The electronic cigarette market doubled to $200 million in 2011.
tamClaims.sentence: The electronic cigarette doubled in sales in 2011 to be a $200 million annual industry.

tamClaims.claim: Industry experts estimate the electronic cigarette market is worth nearly $2 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: industry experts estimate that the market is worth nearly $2 billion

tamClaims.claim: The US tobacco industry is $91 billion annually.
tamClaims.sentence: that is just a fraction of the $91 billion-a-year tobacco industry in the United States.

tamClaims.claim: The total global cigarette market is $720 billion annually.
tamClaims.sentence: The total cigarette market is $720 billion annually coming from 1.3 billion smokers and 6 trillion cigarettes sold.

tamClaims.claim: Electronic cigarettes could eclipse the regular tobacco market, reaching over $350 billion within ten years.
tamClaims.sentence: electronic cigarettes will eclipse the size of the regular tobacco market within the next ten years, reaching over $350 billion in size.
